title: Fade In On Scroll

statement.markdown:
#### Fade In On Scroll
Fade in the text content as the user scrolls down the page.
This is a great way to draw attention to important information without overwhelming the user.
It's also a good accessibility feature as it gives users an opportunity to focus on the content.

constraints: HTML structure should be simple and clean.
CSS should only be used for layout and animation.
JavaScript should be used for scrolling event handling.
